name: RABBIT-CAGE-1
title: rabbit-cage feature missing: agents, commands, hooks, skills, settings not owned by any feature
description: The rabbit-cage feature did not exist. All of .claude/agents/, .claude/commands/, .claude/hooks/, .claude/settings.json, and the root artifacts (CLAUDE.md, README.md, install.sh) are plain files/dirs not owned by any feature. Per design, rabbit-cage must own all of these. Also: .claude/policy/ and .claude/contract/ symlinks do not exist. All six .claude/-level symlinks are missing.

history.note: Resolved as part of rabbit-cage feature implementation (commit fcd4dd4).
